title: rosa canina subsp. biserrata
intro: Rosa canina subsp. biserrata, also known as the prickly rose or biserrate dog rose, is a subspecies of the Rosa canina species and a member of the rose family (Rosaceae). The medicinal properties of Rosa canina subsp. biserrata include its high content of vitamin C, flavonoids, and essential oils, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. Rosa canina subsp. biserrata can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be consumed or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
